note: Small sample of representative prompts for replay-eval demos (offline mock).
prompts: Summarize the following support ticket in one sentence and classify its urgency.
Extract the invoice number, total amount, and due date from this email.
Rewrite this paragraph to be more concise while keeping the technical meaning.
Given these logs, identify the most likely root cause of the timeout.
Classify this customer message as billing, technical, or account.
Draft a two-line reply confirming the meeting and proposing a time.
Translate this product description into plain English for a general audience.
List the action items from this meeting transcript as bullet points.
Decide whether this pull request description matches the code diff summary.
Turn this bug report into a short reproducible test-case outline.
